title: Argo Rollouts: Environment configuration
description: Configuration the Argo Rollouts driver needs to reach one Environment's cluster, where Argo CD Core and the Argo Rollouts controller run.

cluster_agent_id.description: GitLab agent for Kubernetes (agentk) used to reach the cluster running Argo CD Core and the Argo Rollouts controller. The driver resolves it to a connection and drives Argo CD syncs and Rollout promotions through it.
